name: @strav-tests/m6-payment
description: M6 end-to-end smoke — boots Application + DatabaseProvider + HttpProvider + PaymentProvider + StripePaymentProvider + OmisePaymentProvider against real Postgres, runs applyPaymentLedgerMigration, fires signed webhook payloads through a live Bun HTTP server, and asserts dedup + handler dispatch + capability gating. Vendor SDK calls are stubbed (no network).
